# collisionMode

**Interface Property**

A mode that determines the shape of the collision frame.

## Declaration

```swift
collisionMode?: CollisionMode;
```

## Discussion

Use one of the modes available in [doc://com.apple.mapkitjs/documentation/MapKitJS/CollisionMode]:

- `mapkit.Annotation.CollisionMode.Rectangle` — Indicates the bounding box of the annotation.
- `mapkit.Annotation.CollisionMode.Circle` — Indicates a circle within the bounding box.

The default value is `Annotation.CollisionMode.Rectangle`.

## Grouping annotations

- **clusteringIdentifier**: An identifier for grouping annotations into the same cluster.
- **id**: A Place ID that uniquely identifies a feature.
